CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
--------------- Native Event Sender Info ---------------- -- Sender: TriggerComponent -- Space: Server, Client ---------------------------------------------------------
-- Parameters local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity TriggerBodyEntity:Destroy()
_ItemService:CreateItem(Weapon, "나뭇가지", self.Entity.InventoryComponent)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleEntityDestroyEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: local Entity = event.Entity if isvalid(Entity.UIItemSlot) then self:equip() end
